chapters.title: A Decade in Motion
chapters.caption: Every place I slept, worked, ran, drove, and flew for 12 years — 146,297 GPS points, cleaned and rendered.

chapters.title: Where it began — Amherst
chapters.caption: UMass Amherst. Earth Systems, GIS, and the first tracks in the dataset.

chapters.title: A decade in Boston
chapters.caption: Consulting to startups. Years of daily movement etched across the city.

chapters.title: Everywhere else

chapters.title: St. Louis
chapters.caption: Planet Labs — Sr. Data Visualization Engineer. A new grid to trace.

chapters.title: The whole pattern
chapters.caption: Eleven years of a life, drawn as one continuous line.
